description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events to dev, release, and prerelease branches, excluding paths under docs/ and mkdocs.yml. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to run a build-test job on ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest operating systems with different .NET solutions. For each job, check out the code, set up .NET 6, 7, and 8, clean and restore dependencies, build, and test the solutions.
